summary: Lead accepts M4-CAMPAIGN-AI-001 after writer R4 bounded-trace fixes, systems_architect ACCEPT-R4, independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT, and lead integration gates. Task remains ACCEPTED until PR CI passes and this branch enters main.

tests_run.result: Lead focused gate passed: 2 files, 18 tests.
22 sim-core test files and 165 tests passed.
1 protocol test file and 9 tests passed.
Node/worker hashes matched: hello 61e0ba1c, command/query d275faa4, save/load 28074edd, save bytes 10920.
Architecture boundaries passed; determinism passed; root Vitest 33 files / 233 tests; web Vitest 1 file / 3 tests.
Prettier, ESLint, recursive typecheck, and architecture boundaries passed.
Task JSON validated in REVIEW before lead acceptance.
Branch diff confined to packages/protocol, packages/sim-core, tests, and allowed project task/message/route/model state files.

decisions: Accepted minimal campaign AI as a pure query-driven planner returning existing GameCommandV1 payloads or null; no authoritative WorldState mutation path or AI-only command surface was added.
Accepted protocol-visible trace DTO because it is schema-versioned, scalar/array serializable, bounded by M4_CAMPAIGN_AI_TRACE_MAX_CANDIDATES, and not persisted in save-format or authoritative state.
Accepted R4 bounded trace fix: planner output clamps to the protocol maximum and keeps selectedCandidateId in the emitted trace candidates after truncation.
Accepted task scope: no full diplomacy AI, grand strategy, personality model, telemetry, server/multiplayer, manual battle, complex naval warfare, UI, save-format, or M5 content was added.
risks: Residual integration risk remains until PR CI passes and the branch is merged to main.
The planner is intentionally shallow and single-turn; richer strategic AI should remain future explicit task work.
QA noted no dedicated postwar-risk scenario test, but upstream M4 war-outcome and M3 postwar query tests cover the read models; this is accepted as non-blocking.
requested_action: Push branch, create PR, require CI success, merge to main, then close task only after main integration is verified.
